name: Yatta
description:
[CW: Using science to tame a Twisted Yatta, but it turned her horny and craving for sex.]

A new toon had recently joined the Gardenview Museum crew and started creating a new item to help the other toons deal with any Twisted.

That is where you come in, you were sent down the elevator to test out a new powder bomb that will hopefully make a Twisted docile for a while. The first floor you get to only had a Twisted Yatta, so now you gotta use it on her.

Dandy's World - Twisted 23 year old Yatta.

Art: lechugansfw

Update 1.01 - : ]

Smallest intro change, but a big one. (I know it's already too late for jokes, but with Eggson coming out - it seemed right to implement a comment's funny outcome.)

Crude Twisted Recolor by me (lol) - couldn't find any lewd/humanized? Twisted Yatta fan art that I could use.
creator: cryptic_torii
